content.text:
Here are several excellent alternatives to **milk + honey spa (River Oaks)** located on Houston’s west side. Each offers unique services and atmospheres that may align with your preferences.

---

##  Hiatus Spa + Retreat (Uptown area)
- Located at **5740 San Felipe St. Suite 110, Houston, TX 77057**, still on the west side and easily accessible from River Oaks.([houstonmagazine.com](https://www.houstonmagazine.com/top-spas/?utm_source=openai))  
- Notable for its **membership structure**—for around **$89/month**, you get a **monthly massage plus discounts**, perfect for regular visits.([houstonmagazine.com](https://www.houstonmagazine.com/top-spas/?utm_source=openai))  
- Offers a variety of services including massages, skincare, and med spa treatments (like Botox, fillers, microneedling).([houstonmagazine.com](https://www.houstonmagazine.com/top-spas/?utm_source=openai))  

---

##  The Spa at The Post Oak Hotel (Uptown Houston)
- Located at **1600 West Loop South, Houston, TX 77027**—also on the west side.([htownbest.com](https://www.htownbest.com/top-day-spa-houston/?utm_source=openai))  
- A **Forbes five-star spa**, the only one in Texas, featuring luxurious amenities like indoor pools, steam rooms, saunas, zero-gravity massage chairs, and more.([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Post_Oak?utm_source=openai))  
- Signature treatments like the *Ritual of Five Worlds* and varying massage rituals (e.g., Polynesian Floral, Restorative) run from **$195–$660** depending on the treatment and duration.([htownbest.com](https://www.htownbest.com/top-day-spa-houston/?utm_source=openai))  

---

##  Sanctuary Spa (River Oaks / Montrose area)
- Just a few minutes from west Houston, located at **1701 S. Shepherd, Suite C, Houston, TX 77019**.([besanctuary.com](https://www.besanctuary.com/?utm_source=openai))  
- One of Houston’s oldest day spas (established 1984), offering facials, aromatherapeutic massages, hydrotherapy, body wraps, scrubs, and waxing—all grounded in holistic, natural product approaches.([besanctuary.com](https://www.besanctuary.com/?utm_source=openai))  
- Regularly featured by Vogue, Allure, Time, and Travel + Leisure, reflecting its longstanding reputation for quality.([besanctuary.com](https://www.besanctuary.com/?utm_source=openai))  

---

##  Visage Salon & Day Spa (Northwest Houston)
- Located at **17820 West Rd, Houston, TX 77095**, offering a full-service salon and day spa experience on the west side.([visage-salon-spa.com](https://www.visage-salon-spa.com/?utm_source=openai))  
- Services include hair, nails, facials, microdermabrasion, makeup, massage (Swedish, hot stone, deep tissue, prenatal), waxing, and luxury packages.([visage-salon-spa.com](https://www.visage-salon-spa.com/?utm_source=openai))  
- Described as a “one-stop” spa where you can treat yourself head-to-toe in one visit.([visage-salon-spa.com](https://www.visage-salon-spa.com/?utm_source=openai))  

---

##  The NOW Massage (Houston Heights / Heights area)
- Although a bit north, Houston Heights is still accessible from west Houston.([htownbest.com](https://www.htownbest.com/top-day-spa-houston/?utm_source=openai))  
- Known for **affordable, high-quality massages** and modern amenities like touchless check-in, a mobile app, and a membership option.([htownbest.com](https://www.htownbest.com/top-day-spa-houston/?utm_source=openai))  
- Praised highly by reviewers (e.g., Yelp: 5/5, Google: 4.6/5) for consistent quality and value.([htownbest.com](https://www.htownbest.com/top-day-spa-houston/?utm_source=openai))  

---

###  Quick Comparison Table

| Spa Name                 | Location & Access                     | Highlights & Services                                                                                             |
|--------------------------|----------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Hiatus Spa + Retreat     | 5740 San Felipe (Uptown)              | Membership massages, medspa treatments                                                                              |
| Spa at The Post Oak      | 1600 West Loop S (Uptown)             | Ultra-luxurious spa with spa amenities like pools, steam, high-end rituals                                         |
| Sanctuary Spa            | 1701 S. Shepherd (River Oaks)         | Established holistic & aromatherapy services, facials, body treatments                                             |
| Visage Salon & Day Spa   | 17820 West Rd (NW Houston)            | Salon + spa combo—hair, nails, facials, massage, skincare                                                           |
| The NOW Massage          | Houston Heights                       | Affordable, high-quality massage services with modern, app-based service management                                |

---

##  Recommendations Based on Preferences

- **Seeking luxury amenities**: *Spa at The Post Oak* is ideal—nested in a five-star environment with indulgent treatments.
- **Want frequent treatments on a budget**: *Hiatus Spa + Retreat*’s membership makes regular visits both affordable and convenient.
- **Prefer long-established, relaxed spa setting**: *Sanctuary Spa* offers aromatic, holistic therapies in a storied, calm environment.
- **Looking for hair, nail, and massage in one stop**: *Visage* covers all your beauty needs in one location.
- **Value-driven massages with flexibility**: *The NOW Massage* offers top-notch massage services with modern conveniences and accessible pricing.

---
